snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Goli Maar De sung by Asees Kaur ft. Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar.

Stream full song here

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/goli-maar-de-2
JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Goli-Maar-De/Goli-Maar-De/AyYeUzppYAA?referrer=svn_source=share&svn_medium=com.whatsapp&utm_source=share&utm_medium=com.whatsapp
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3jyEv2uLWWTk9K1fQuHkYT?si=XqM2bkllRxmx_ZGgt2arpA&utm_source=whatsapp
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X4J71ZN?trackAsin=B08X4J36MM&ref=dm_sh_97ZKhC6OyKL4wWxHSxy64bBK8
Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/album/goli-maar-de/bl_3616553446935
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJdh3uT9/
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645



Singer - Asees Kaur
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Vicky Sandhu
Composition- Vicky Sandhu
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal

Featuring - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Rav Dhillon 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Yuvraj Indori
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
chorographer - John 
Production - Kuldeep 
Editing - Zipsi 
Colour - Onkar
Stylist - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Lyrics :

Karda rehnda a ignore ve 
Tere moohre chalda ni zor ve 
Shelian to rakhdi lukake tenu main 
Mere bina takki na koi hor ve 
Kolo d mukh fer langde eh hunde ni Asool pyar de 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Jini vaari tere vall Dekha sohnya 
Tera ta dhyan mere vall howe na
Odo tk tenu kuj feel hunda na 
Jado tak tere moohre kuri rowe na 
Tu Khijea Rehna a roz ve 
Kde hass meri Jind thaarde 
J sade vall Takna ..
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Matchinga main Kardi a Jaan jaan Ke 
Jaan bujh Notice tu Krda e nai 
Mere bina rehna a tu bada  khush ve 
Tere bina Pal Mera sarda e nai 
Vicky Sandhu Main Chaluni apni Band Kar tere gere bahar de .. 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde.


#GoliMaarDe #RohitZinjurke #NitaShilimkar

snippet.title: Oorigobba Raaja-Yuvarathnaa (Kannada) - Puneeth Rajkumar |Santhosh Ananddram|Thaman S| Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting the Kannada song 'Oorigobba Raaja' from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa' by Hombale Films

Oorigobba Raaja, a scintillating party number, is all set to drive us crazy. Watch the duo Sayyeshaa Saigal and Puneeth Rajkumar burn up the dance floor. With Jaani Master's hook steps in the Kannada new song you, won't resist but to replicate. With superb lyrics penned by Santhosh Anandram. Hear the music by Thaman S. Which will not fail but to leave a mark on your playlists!

Get a chance to hear the other Yuvarathnaa songs and music tracks by staying subscribed to Hombale Films YouTube Channel. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Sometimes all you need is some good music. And JioSaavn will have it covered for you with the latest song 'Oorigobba Raaja' from the upcoming Kannada cinema 'Yuvarathnaa.'
https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/oorigobba-raaja/GwMpWgJyYgc

snippet.title: @Yo Yo Honey Singh  Sister’s Wedding
snippet.description:
Vlog # 58
Attending @Yo Yo Honey Singh Paji's sisters wedding. Honey Paji is so sweet and down to earth. after attaining so much success in Bollywood he still keeps his feet firm on thee ground, which is a hard to find trait.

Had to mute all the Stage performances due to copyright issue. Watch the uncut performances here
https://youtu.be/xRP1KhebB2g 

Thank you Honey paji. and all the wishes for the newly wed couple.

ജൂലിയറ്റിന്റെ കട്ടപ്പനയിലേക്ക് സത്യം തേടി ..

snippet.title: Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana | Episode - 3 | Don Pruthvi | Sri Satya | Kusuma | Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series. 

Directed by: Saikumar Netha

Cast : Don Pruthvi, Sri Satya ,  Kusuma , Anisha Reddy , Karthik, Teja Vikky
 
Dop:  Seshu Raj Dadala

Concept : Madhav

Dialogue Writer : Raghuram Bhahuthama

Writer :  Manu Alluri

Music & Mixing : Srujan Shashanka

Violin : Sandiliya Pisapati

Editing : Krishna Karthik Vunnava

VFX: Pavan Kumar Konte

Title design: Nikhil Concepts

Poster Design : design Manchu

Sound Engineer : Vamsi Vinod Nalli.
Asst Sound Engineer : Venkat K

Co- Director : Mallikarjun Reddy
Assistant directors : Tony Manoj, Jayanth

Costumes by http://myperfectfit.co.in

Executive producer: Srividya p

Line producer : Sai Harish

Produced by Infinitum media.

snippet.title: Challenging Star Darshan Clarifies On His Fans Misbehavior With Actor Jaggesh In Mysuru
snippet.description:
Challenging Star Darshan Clarifies On His Fans Misbehavior With Actor Jaggesh In Mysuru | ಮೈಸೂರಲ್ಲಿ ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೆಶ್‌ ಜತೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳ ವರ್ತನೆ ವಿಷ್ಯ ತಡವಾಗಿ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು: ದರ್ಶನ್‌ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟನೆ

ಮೈಸೂರಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ಜತೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ಅತಿರೇಕದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ, ಟಿವಿ9 ಜತೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌, ಘಟನೆಯ ವಿಷಯ ತಮಗೆ ತಡವಾಗಿ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು. ನಾನು ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಿಂದ ಹೊರಗಿದ್ದೆ. ಜಗ್ಗೆಶ್‌ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟರು. ನಮ್ಮ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾನಾಡದೇ ಮತ್ಯಾರ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ಎಷ್ಟಾದ್ರೂ ಅವರು ಹಿರಿಯರು ಎಂದು ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ಹಾಗೂ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ನಡುವೆ ನಡೆದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟಿಕರಣ ನೀಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ನೋಡಿ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌ ಏನ್‌ ಹೇಳಿದ್ರು ಅನ್ನೋದು...

ಮೈಸೂರಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ಜತೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ಅತಿರೇಕದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ, ಟಿವಿ9 ಜತೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌, ಘಟನೆಯ ವಿಷಯ ತಮಗೆ ತಡವಾಗಿ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು. ನಾನು ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಿಂದ ಹೊರಗಿದ್ದೆ. ಜಗ್ಗೆಶ್‌ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟರು. ನಮ್ಮ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾನಾಡದೇ ಮತ್ಯಾರ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ಎಷ್ಟಾದ್ರೂ ಅವರು ಹಿರಿಯರು ಎಂದು ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ಹಾಗೂ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ನಡುವೆ ನಡೆದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟಿಕರಣ ನೀಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ನೋಡಿ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌ ಏನ್‌ ಹೇಳಿದ್ರು ಅನ್ನೋದು...

snippet.title: MAZAA | B Praak | Jaani | Arvindr K | New Hindi Songs 2021 |Gurmeet | Hansika | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
"There is no love without forgiveness and there is no forgiveness without love"

"Mazaa" is a song about confession, love, betrayal, regret, and forgiveness from beloved... 

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

Audio Credits:
Singer& Music By: B Praak
Lyricist & Composer: Jaani 
Video: Arvinder Khaira 
Presentation by: Dilraj Nandha 

Team:-

Music Themes Designed By B Praak
Arranged&Programmed By Kartik dev Gaurav Dev 
Flute By Paras Nath
Violin By Manas 
Mix&Mastered By Gurjinder&Akash
B Praak Costume by: Mayurkataria
Assistant Director: Satnam Singh, Jais Sivia, Sukhman Singh
Production by: Third eye films (Faheem Rahiman) Dubai

Hair: Asir Sayeed (team HAKIM AALIM )
Costume: Yash Badheka

Personal assistant: Pintu yaadav

#Mazaa
#Jaani

Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya

Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

snippet.title: Panghat – Roohi | Rajkummar – Janhvi - Varun | Sachin- Jigar, Amitabh B | Asees K | Divya K|Mellow D
snippet.description:
Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin – Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

Listen to Panghat on JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/panghat-from-roohi/GwkZVgFnW3g

Also listen on:

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2g8fA9Ijc3sAlfkQFlYxsf?si=UYQN_L3uQ6i8GZjFA5KVeA&utm_source=whatsapp
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/panghat-from-roohi
Amazon prime music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X3NH8HJ?trackAsin=B08X3MX1P1&ref=dm_sh_4tqolTG0zNYeUeiswLbAMLYYz
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJeGyKmK/
Wynk music - https://wynk.in/u/EsLKwTcwf 
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/panghat-from-roohi-single/1554475918?ls


Song – Panghat 
Film - Roohi
Music Composer - Sachin - Jigar
Lyricist - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singer - Asees Kaur, Divya Kumar , Sachin- Jigar
Rap by Mellow D 
Arranged & Programmed - Sachin- Jigar
Assistant Programmers - Hrishikesh Gangan & Abhishek Singh
Music Production Head - Romil Ved
Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai & FSOB Studios
Assistant Mix Engineer - Michael Edwin Pillai

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma 
Directed by: Hardik Mehta 
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba 
Music by: Sachin-Jigar
A Jio Studios Release
By Maddock Films 

Lyrics :- 
JULMI BADI AUKAT PE YE RAAT AAYI HAIMANN TO HAI MERA PAWANMAGAR 
YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI

PANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTIPANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR

(ANTRA)
O SAIYAAN BAABUJI BUMBAIYATERI BUTTERFALAIYAKABSE BAITHI TERI RAAH TAAKE

DAAAIYA APNE PYAAR KI NAAIYABEECH BHAVAR MAI NAAIYAPAAR LAGA JOGAN KE BAAGH JAGE

O MERI FULJADIYO RESABAR ZARA KARIYO RE

HAANSABAR KARTE HUE KITNA BHARUUN MAIHANDPUMP SE MATKI

PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI

snippet.description:
Actor Jaggesh Reaction On Actor Darshan Matter | ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ್ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್​ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ವರ್ತನೆ ಸರಿಯಲ್ಲ : ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್

ನಾನು ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿಲ್ಲ. ನನ್ನ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಷಡ್ಯಂತ್ರ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ನಾನು ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಆಡಿಯೋ ಕಟ್​​ ಮಾಡಿ ವೈರಲ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಆದ್ರೂ ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ್ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್​ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ವರ್ತನೆ ಸರಿಯಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್ ಹೇಳಿದರು.

snippet.title: AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA : Delhi Jaane Tere Yaar Ne | Anjali Raghav | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
Sonotek Music Presenting "Delhi Jaana Tere Yaar Ne ( Official Video )" a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Delhi Jaane Tere Yaar Ne Song Starring Amit Saini Rohtakiya & Anjali Raghav. This Superhit Haryanvi Song Sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Penned by RP Singh. Music given by GR Music. this video directed by Jeetu G. Music Label by Sonotek Music 

#DELHIJAANETEREYAARNE #AMITSAINI_ROHTAKIYA #SONOTEKMUSIC #NewHaryanviSongsHaryanavi2021 #HaryanviSongs2021

♪ Available on ♪
https://gaana.com/album/delhi-jaane-tere-yaar-ne

Song : Delhi Jaane Tere Yaar Ne
Singer : Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Starring : Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Anjali Raghav
Music : Gr Music
Writer : RP Singh
Co Artist : Deepak Kapoor, Shivas Jangra, Sagar Baba, Dr Ashok Verma, Muskan Yadav
DOP : Munish Sharma
Director : Jeetu G
Production Manager : Shubham Sambhir
Producer : SONOTEK 
Label : Sonotek Music
Publicity Design :- Muku Jangra
Copyrights : Sonotek Cassettes Company

Like us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/SonotekVideo​​
                                        https://www.facebook.com/Sonotek-Musi...​
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/sonotekmusic​​
                                            https://www.instagram.com/sonotek_video​

LIKE || SHARE || COMMENT || SUBSCRIBE

Song Lyrics

RAI EK GAANE CHAALE DUSRA YE CASE CHAALGE
KUCHH PAHLA JAANAE THE KUCHH SHESH JAANGE
TERI GAAL MAI GUMAAKE ZERO MAAND DI
TERE ARIYE KE GUNDE MERA FACE JAANGE
RAI AANKH RAKHAE LAAL RAAKAE HATH MAI DUNAAL
KITE LAADE NAE THIKAANAE PAHREDAAR NAE

O AAPA KITE BHAR MILAANGE DELHI JAANE SAARI TERE YAAR NE
MULAAKAT KITE BHAR KARAANGE SAARA SAHAR JAANE TERE YAAR NE

RAE CASE KARWAJA NAYE NAYE YAAR PAE
JAD AAV SAE MILAN TU RAE BACE KHOL KE
RAE TERE TAYI LYAUNGA DRESS FAVORITE
TERE BHAIYA KHATAR LYAU BET BASE BOLL KE
MAKHA CASE KARWAGI RAE TU NAYE RAE NAYE
RA KE KARU CHHATI KE MAE CHHED BI
NA BAAR JAAV SHED JA PARIYA JISI MERI JAAN NAE

O AAPA KITE BHAR MILAANGE DELHI JAANE SAARI TERE YAAR NE
MULAAKAT KITE BHAR KARAANGE SAARA SAHAR JAANE TERE YAAR NE

JAE HAWA MAI GUMAANI PADI LAAT YAAR NAE
FER AAKE MERA FACE HAWALAAT DEKHIYE
RAE FOOL KI JYU HALKI SAE GAAT AALI TU
KITE BHARI PADJA YA MULAKAAT DEKHIYE
RAE TERA RP SAE CHITTA GANDA KARAE SAE SALIKA
KONYA HON DEV FIKA GAHRE PYAR NAE

O AAPA KITE BHAR MILAANGE DELHI JAANE SAARI TERE YAAR NE
MULAAKAT KITE BHAR KARAANGE SAARA SAHAR JAANE TERE YAAR NE

snippet.title: രണ്ടാംഘട്ടം Prelims. പലരുടെയും പ്രതീക്ഷ തെറ്റിയില്ല...Cut of എത്ര?  Mr & Mrs psc
snippet.description:
നമ്മൾ ഇതുവരെ പഠിച്ച current affairs ക്ലാസ്സുകൾ താഴെ കൊടുക്കുന്നു.. ഓരോ PART ലെയും Topic കൃത്യമായി എഴുതിയിട്ടുണ്ട്... കാണാത്ത Topic ലെ ക്ലാസ്സ്‌ എടുത്ത് കണ്ടുനോക്കുക.... എല്ലാത്തിന്റെയും ലിങ്ക് താഴെ താഴെ ഉണ്ട് 

✅️part 1 --ബഹിരാകാശം  ( ISRO, ETC )

https://youtu.be/C5GILE9B7vA

✅️part  2--  ബഹിരാകാശം (ചന്ദ്രയാൻ 1,2,3)

https://youtu.be/LRKlHYxFSgc

✅️part 3 -- പുരസ്‌കാരങ്ങൾ ( Mixed)

 https://youtu.be/gIa0kTPJ9L0

✅️part 4 -- പുരസ്‌കാരങ്ങൾ  ( കോഡിലൂടെ )

https://youtu.be/8f4WX4xL2E0

✅️part 5 --പുരസ്‌കാരങ്ങൾ  ( കോഡിലൂടെ )

https://youtu.be/dWEcVHOHaxE

✅️part 6 --  Covid-19  (ഉത്ഭവം മുതൽ )

https://youtu.be/bRauZU_Y3bA

✅️part 7 -- കേരളം 

https://youtu.be/aj9Bra0Wkqo

✅️part 8 -- കായിക അവാർഡുകൾ 

https://youtu.be/iQL6OzSa3og

✅️part 9 -- പ്രധാന 5 Topic

https://youtu.be/Eq52yWAsqeA

✅️part 10-- സർക്കാർ പദ്ധതികൾ 

https://youtu.be/iSIISpQ7e_w

✅️part 11 -- Mixed ( തെറ്റി പോകുന്ന കാൾ
                                     ചോദ്യങ്ങൾ )

https://youtu.be/tYwxpjqY-iQ

✅️part 12 -- Covid-19 ( second class)

https://youtu.be/2htCQkPWkoA

✅️PART-13 - സർക്കാർ പദ്ധതികൾ
                        ( India, kerala )  

https://youtu.be/28NSnqh8S0Q

✅️PART-14 -

snippet.title: மாசி மகம் 2021 - பாவங்களையும் தோஷங்களையும் போக்க செய்யவேண்டியவை | Masi Magam 2021 | Maasi Magam
snippet.description:
மாசி மகம் என்பது மாசி மாத பௌர்ணமியுடன் கூடிவரும் மக நட்சத்திர நாளில் கொண்டாடப்படும் ஒரு சிறப்பான நாளாகும். அன்றைய தினம் கடலாடும் விழா என்றும் கொண்டாடப்படுகிறது.

பிறவிப் பெருங்கடலில் வீழ்ந்து துன்பக்கடலில் மாய்ந்தழுந்தும் ஆன்மாவானது இறைவனது அருட்கடலாகிய இன்பவெள்ளத்தில் அமிழ்ந்து திளைக்கச் செய்யும் நன்நாளே மாசிமகக் கடலாடு தீர்த்தமாகும். தீர்த்தமாட இயலாதவர்கள் விரதமிருந்து கோயிலுக்குச் சென்று இந்நாளைக் கொண்டாடுவர்.

தமிழ் நாட்டில் 12 ஆண்டுகளுக்கு ஒரு முறை கும்பகோணத்தில் கும்பேசுவரர் கோயிலில் மாசிமகத் திருவிழா (மகாமகம்) சிறப்பாக நடைபெறும்.

- ஆத்ம ஞான மையம்

snippet.title: Love Guru || Nazarbattu || Pawan Yadav
snippet.description:
A heartbroken boy named Gopal is searching for the true love of his life. But he is loved by no one, no one likes him because of his dark color and clothing style. One day he meets a love guru who changed his life. He taught him how to dress and how to impress a girl and within few days Gopal successively impressed the love of his life. Enjoy this romcom episode with lots of fun and twists.

#loveguru #LoveStory

snippet.title: What’s In My Make-up pouch ft. Bigg Boss 14’s Nikki Tamboli |Exclusive|
snippet.description:
Bigg Boss 14’s second runner up Nikki Tamboli, who has gained name and fame from the show, recently revealed her perfect makeup secrets, trapped inside her favourite makeup products. The actress gave a peep into her makeup bag and shared bits about the makeup products that she uses the most. From nail polish, lipsticks of bright and nude shades, lip balms, concealer, compact and a few more eye makeup essentials. Nikki revealed that she has learnt to do eye makeup from fellow BB contestant and friend Rubina Dilaik. Moving ahead, she advised to always keep it natural when it comes to makeup. 
#BiggBoss14 #NikkiTamboli #WhatsInMyBag

Check out the video to know more.

snippet.title: Suryaputra Mahavir Karna - Official Movie Logo | Vashu Bhagnani | Jackky Bhagnani | RS Vimal
snippet.description:
Presenting the official logo of our magnum opus 'Suryaputra Mahavir Karna'!

'Mahabharata' is one epic tale that has inspired many film-makers around the globe. However, barely any scripts are presented on the celluloid from Suryaputra Mahavir Karna's perspective. Bringing this story alive for the first time ever on the big screen by producers Vashu Bhagnani, Deepshikha Deshmukh, and Jackky Bhagnani.

The multilingual project is written and directed by R S Vimal. This film will be the most distinguished and grand production from Pooja Entertainment till date.

India's celebrated poet Dr. Kumar Vishwas will pen the dialogues and additional screenplay of the film. 

'Suryaputra Mahavir Karna' will be made in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and Malayalam and is all set to redefine the genre of opulent period dramas in the Indian film industry.

#SuryaputraMahavirKarna #KumarVishwas #PoojaEntertainment #VashuBhagnani #JackkyBhagnani #Epic #Mahabharata #Karna

Music & Background Music: KP
Sound Design: Rajakrishnan MR

Keyboards & Rhythm programming: Chinna, Kalyan, KP
Vocals: Kapil Kapilan, Lavita Lobo, Nakul Abhyankar, Chinna, KP

Recording engineer: Avinash @20DB Studios

snippet.title: Main Sharabi | Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam | SR | Rajeev Raja | New Hindi Song | SR Brothers
snippet.description:
SR Brothers Presenting :) A New Heart Touching Love Story Video Song On  "Main Sharabi" (Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam ) Song Which Is Beautifully Sung  By "Rajeev Raja & Nizami Brothers" And  Featured By Sachin Rao (SR),Suraj Tiwari & Shikha Tiwari . Chess Is A Recreational And Competitive Board Game Played Between Two Players.  Just like That There Is Always A Competition Between Hero And Villain But Who Pays The Proper Attention, Be  Loyal And Kind Can Win The Battle Of Life . snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
A Zack Snyder film. On Netflix May 21. 

Following a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries take the ultimate gamble, venturing into the quarantine zone to pull off the greatest heist ever attempted.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Ana de la Reguera, Matthias Schweighöfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Raúl Castillo, Michael Cassidy, and Garret Dillahunt.

Story by Zack Snyder  
Screenplay by Zack Snyder & Shay Hatten and Joby Harold  
Directed by Zack Snyder

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://youtube.com/Netflix

snippet.title: എൻ ജീവനായ മുല്ലേ En Jeevanaya priyane | Ansar Ansu | Nadha Jaleel | Samju Zag Thanseer koothuparamba
snippet.description:
➤ Album : EN JEEVANAYA MULLE
➤ Song Name: En Jeevanaya priyane
➤ Singer : SULFATH BANU
➤ Music  : ANSAR ANSU AJMAL CHERUTHALA
➤ Lyrics :  ANSAR ANSU
➤ Orchestraion : salam veeroli 
➤ Camera :  IRSHAD JAZZ
➤ Editting : AABI SALEEM
➤ Presents : Thanseer koothuparamba
➤ Cast :  ANSAR ANSU Nadha Jaleel Samju Zag
➤ Story : ALI ZIYAN
➤ Feedback : 9745268950 [ Whatsapp ]
➤ Diriction  : ANSAR ANSU
➤ Produced : TAALBOYS VISION
...................................................................................................
എൻ ജീവനായ മുല്ലേ En Jeevanaya priyane | Ansar Ansu | Nadha Jaleel | Samju Zag Thanseer koothuparamba
...................................................................................................
➤ Lyrics 
En jeevanaya priyane ni ende matramavile..
En jeevanang tannekam oru naalil ni manjidalle...
Aha naatumavinde chotil naam kootu koodillee...
kanatha nalugalilellaam mindan kothichathallee..
Qulbinde taalamalle ni..karalinde naalamalle ni
                                                   (en jeevanaya)

Duniyavil mohabathumai njan ninde koode nilkam..
oru vaakil nin nokil kothiyoode vann punaram..
Oru nooru janamamen roohilaay ni vannuchernidenam..
Ee logamannu nalkunna pranayavum niyumaaidenam..
Ini illa mannilay ninnil pakaramay vera maaranennil..
                                                   (en jeevanaya)

En munnilay ida nenjilay ni annu vanna neram..
Kuliraayidum anuraagavum hrdayathilay cherthu..
Chuvarum paranju njanum arinju avanende roohumenn..
Pakalil thelinju irulil padarnu en qulbilaayolicch..
Ee kaalamere avanood kootu koodan kothikunnu njan
                                                   (en jeevanaya)
...................................................................................................

എൻ ജീവനായ പ്രിയനേ നീ എന്റെ മാത്രമാവില്ലെ 
എൻ ജീവനങ്ങ് തന്നേക്കാം ഒരു നാലില്ല നീ മാഞ്ഞിടല്ലെ.......
ആ നാട്ടുമാവിന്റെ ചോട്ടിൽ നാം കൂട്ടു കൂടിയില്ലെ.....
 കാണാത്ത നാളുകളില്ലെല്ലാം മിണ്ടാൻ കൊതിച്ചതല്ലെ.......
കൽബിന്റെ താളമല്ലെ നീ കരളിന്റെ നാളമല്ലേ നീ 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )

ദുനിയാവിലെ മുഹബതുമായി ഞാൻ നിന്റെ കൂടെ നിൽക്കാം
 ഒരു വാക്കിൽ നിൻ നോക്കിൽ നിന്റെ കൂടെ നിൽക്കാം....
ഒരു നൂറു ജന്മമെൻ റൂഹിലായി നീ വന്നു ചേർന്നിടെണo......
ഇനി ഇല്ലാ മണ്ണിലായി നിൻ പകരമായി വേറെ മാരനെന്നിൽ...... 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )
എൻ മുന്നിലായി ഇട നെഞ്ചിലായി നീ അന്നു വന്ന നേരം...
കുളിരായിടും അനുരാകവും ഹൃദയത്തിലായി ചേർത്തു..
ചുവരും പറഞ്ഞു ഞാനും അറിഞ്ഞു അവനെന്റെ റുഹുമെന്ന്..
ഈ കാലമെറെ അവനോട് കൂട്ടു കൂടാൻ കൊതിക്കുന്നു ഞാൻ 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )


...................................................................................................

ml.description:
➤ Album : EN JEEVANAYA MULLE

...................................................................................................
എൻ ജീവനായ മുല്ലേ En Jeevanaya priyane | Ansar Ansu | Nadha Jaleel | Samju Zag Thanseer koothuparamba
...................................................................................................
➤ Lyrics 
En jeevanaya priyane ni ende matramavile..
En jeevanang tannekam oru naalil ni manjidalle...
Aha naatumavinde chotil naam kootu koodillee...
kanatha nalugalilellaam mindan kothichathallee..
Qulbinde taalamalle ni..karalinde naalamalle ni
                                                   (en jeevanaya)

Duniyavil mohabathumai njan ninde koode nilkam..
oru vaakil nin nokil kothiyoode vann punaram..
Oru nooru janamamen roohilaay ni vannuchernidenam..
Ee logamannu nalkunna pranayavum niyumaaidenam..
Ini illa mannilay ninnil pakaramay vera maaranennil..
                                                   (en jeevanaya)

En munnilay ida nenjilay ni annu vanna neram..
Kuliraayidum anuraagavum hrdayathilay cherthu..
Chuvarum paranju njanum arinju avanende roohumenn..
Pakalil thelinju irulil padarnu en qulbilaayolicch..
Ee kaalamere avanood kootu koodan kothikunnu njan
                                                   (en jeevanaya)
...................................................................................................

എൻ ജീവനായ പ്രിയനേ നീ എന്റെ മാത്രമാവില്ലെ 
എൻ ജീവനങ്ങ് തന്നേക്കാം ഒരു നാലില്ല നീ മാഞ്ഞിടല്ലെ.......
ആ നാട്ടുമാവിന്റെ ചോട്ടിൽ നാം കൂട്ടു കൂടിയില്ലെ.....
 കാണാത്ത നാളുകളില്ലെല്ലാം മിണ്ടാൻ കൊതിച്ചതല്ലെ.......
കൽബിന്റെ താളമല്ലെ നീ കരളിന്റെ നാളമല്ലേ നീ 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )

ദുനിയാവിലെ മുഹബതുമായി ഞാൻ നിന്റെ കൂടെ നിൽക്കാം
 ഒരു വാക്കിൽ നിൻ നോക്കിൽ നിന്റെ കൂടെ നിൽക്കാം....
ഒരു നൂറു ജന്മമെൻ റൂഹിലായി നീ വന്നു ചേർന്നിടെണo......
ഇനി ഇല്ലാ മണ്ണിലായി നിൻ പകരമായി വേറെ മാരനെന്നിൽ...... 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )
എൻ മുന്നിലായി ഇട നെഞ്ചിലായി നീ അന്നു വന്ന നേരം...
കുളിരായിടും അനുരാകവും ഹൃദയത്തിലായി ചേർത്തു..
ചുവരും പറഞ്ഞു ഞാനും അറിഞ്ഞു അവനെന്റെ റുഹുമെന്ന്..
ഈ കാലമെറെ അവനോട് കൂട്ടു കൂടാൻ കൊതിക്കുന്നു ഞാൻ 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )


...................................................................................................

snippet.title: 60 വയസ്സ് കഴിഞ്ഞവർ പ്രത്യേകം ശ്രദ്ധിക്കൂ .നാളത്തെ പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പുകൾ. ക്ഷേമ പെൻഷൻ വിതരണം ആരംഭിക്കുന
snippet.description:
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.
follow My facebook page https://www.facebook.com/Info-Media-Vlog-100434298313336

snippet.title: Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik on her journey, fakeness, her relationship with Abhinav| Exclusive
snippet.description:
Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik in an exclusive interview with Telly Talk shares the feeling of the winning moment. She talks about her journey in the Bigg Boss 14 house where she was rejected at first but eventually reached the finale. Rubina shares her plans of using the prize money. She also talks about her husband Abhinav Shukla and her response to the people questioning them for being fake. She also reveals the reason why they decided to make the problems in their relationship public. Rubina also shares who she will be in contact with after the show. Watch the video to know more.

localized.title: Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik on her journey, fakeness, her relationship with Abhinav| Exclusive
localized.description:
Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik in an exclusive interview with Telly Talk shares the feeling of the winning moment. She talks about her journey in the Bigg Boss 14 house where she was rejected at first but eventually reached the finale. Rubina shares her plans of using the prize money. She also talks about her husband Abhinav Shukla and her response to the people questioning them for being fake. She also reveals the reason why they decided to make the problems in their relationship public. Rubina also shares who she will be in contact with after the show. Watch the video to know more.

snippet.title: क्यों है Jetha की दुकान On Sale? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता- Ep 3108 -23rd Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/gokuldham-without-jethalal-1000109034?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3108: Jethalal's Shop On Sale
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal has decided to sell his shop so he calls Bagha to inform about it. Bagha gets shocked after knowing this but Jethalal makes him understand that this is the only option left and asks Bagha to stick a board of Shop on sell in front of Gada Electronics. Bagha and Magan get emotional while sticking that board. Why Jethalal is selling his shop?. Catch the fun and watch the full episode now on SonyLiv.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Episode 3109: Gada Electronics Sold
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal informs Taarak and Bhide that he had put the board of sale on his shop as soon as he'll get any buyer he will sell the shop and also asked Taarak and Bhide to take care of his house as he is shifting to his village. Bagha comes along with Jagatram Seth at Jethalal's house. Jagatram buys Gada Electronics and asks Jethalal to remove the board of Gada Electronics as he wants to put the board of Jagatram Electronics. snippet.title: ANNIVERSARY BHOOL GAYA | शादी की सालगिरह भूल गया Hindi Family Short Movie | Ruchi and Piyush
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 205 & 206 | Recap
snippet.description:
After Sumati returns home, she accuses Binoy of trying to harm her, which angers Anirudh and Bondita. When Sampurna tries to defend Binoy with her excuses, Bondita is quick to realise that Sampurna is lying and confronts her. Will Bondita manage to calm herself?

#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1181 & 1182 | Recap
snippet.description:
After seeing Heer, Virat fumes with rage and frantically attempts to kill her. Subsequently, when Virat fails to recognise Heer, she attempts suicide to evoke his love for her. Will Virat come back to his senses and stop her from committing suicide?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

আজকের এই ভিডিওটা বিভিন্ন কাপলরা OYO তে গিয়ে কি করে, তার উপর। কেউ হয়তো চুরি করে, আবার কেউ হয়তো ধোঁকা খায়। আর হ্যাঁ, ভিডিওটি বিভিন্ন ভাষায় দেখেছো হয়তো তোমরা, আমার কিছু সিকোয়েন্স ও বিভিন্ন হিন্দি বা অন্য ভাষার থেকে ইন্সপায়ার্ড হয়ে করা। আর ভিডিওটি শুধুমাত্র মজার জন্য করা, কারও আবেগ কে আঘাত করবার জন্য নয়। তবুও যদি কেউ আঘাত পেয়ে থাকে, তার জন্য আমি একান্ত ভাবে দুঃখিত। আর হ্যাঁ, অবশ্যই ভিডিওটি ভাল লাগলে সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে ভুলো না চ্যানেলটা। আর হ্যাঁ, কমেণ্টে জানাও পরবর্তী কোন টপিক্র ভিডিও টা করবো |


Co Actors- Santanu, Subho Ranjan Mukherjee, Indranil
Camera & CC - Mainak
Edit- Adeeb
Script- Amit (Some segments inspired from Sushant Maggoo)
Location- Kajali Guest House

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1182 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Heer wishes to undergo surgery and lead a normal life with Virat, but Jharna grows worried thinking about losing Virat to Heer. Will Heer's wishes come true? Tune in to the sneak peek of the upcoming episode to know more.

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Lyrics of "Deewane Hum Nahi" - 

Yun na parda kar..
Ab to Aja mere Samne.. 
Tera hun mai.. 
Meri har Saansien .. 
Tera naam Lein..

Behki behki nigahien.. 
Dhundhe tere raste.. 
Ati hai to lejati.. 
Meri har shikayetien.. 

Lehron ki behti hai vo.. 
Chalti shaan se hai hatke.. 
Kaatil ye Rukh Tera.. 
Hai Kaatil har Ada.. 

Deewane Hum Nahi hote.. 
Deewani raat Aati hai..
Mohabbat ki Nahi jati.. 
Mohabbat aazmati hai.. 

Kisiki aankhon se.. 
Kisiki baton se.. 
Kisiki chahat ke.. 
Kisiki aadat se.. 

Haye re dil ko satati hai..
Bohot Zyada tadpati hai.. 

OoooOoo... 

Ishq Vishq main ulajh gaya vo.. 
Chod ke duniya Daari..
Bhul gaya vo Khul ke Jeena.. 
Raat nashe vich Mari... x2

Mangta hai vo dua.. 
Qubool Karo Al Baari
Doob Gaye Sab rahi Dar pe.. 
Aaj bhi qissa zaari.. 

Lehron ki behti hai vo.. 
Chalti shaan se hai hatke.. 
Kaatil ye Rukh Tera.. 
Hai Kaatil har Ada..

Haye re dil ko satati hai..

snippet.title: 🔴-LIVE-മമ്പുറം സ്വലാത്ത് തത്സമയം 25 - 02 - 2021 I 07:00 pm
snippet.description:
MAMPURAM MAQAM SWALATH MAJLIS I 25 - 02-2021
#mampurammaqam#swalath#live


മമ്പുറം മഖാമിലേക്ക് സ്വാഗതം .ദക്ഷിണേന്ത്യയിലെ പ്രധാന തീർത്ഥാടന കേന്ദ്രമാണ് മമ്പുറം മഖാം. മലപ്പുറം ജില്ലയിലെ തിരൂരങ്ങാടി താലൂക്കിൽ,  സ്ഥിതി ചെയ്യുന്ന മഖാം ശരീഫിൽ അന്ത്യവിശ്രമം കൊള്ളുന്നത് കേരളീയ മുസ്‌ലിം ചരിത്രത്തിലും അധിനിവേശ വിരുദ്ധ പോരാട്ടങ്ങളിലും ശ്രദ്ധേയ സാന്നിധ്യമായിരുന്ന ഖുഥ്ബുസ്സമാൻ സയ്യിദ് അലവി ബിൻ മുഹമ്മദ് ബിൻ സഹ്ൽ മൗലദ്ദവീല തങ്ങളും കുടുംബാംഗങ്ങളുമാണ്. യമനിലെ ഹള്‌റമൗത്തിൽ നിന്ന് ഇസ്‌ലാമിക പ്രബോധനാവശ്യാർത്ഥം മലബാറിലെത്തുകയും പിന്നീട് ഇവിടത്തെ മത-സാമൂഹിക-രാഷ്ട്രീയ മേഖലകളിൽ ശക്തമായ ഇടപെടലുകൾ നടത്തുകയും ചെയ്ത അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ ആത്മീയ തണൽ തേടി ജീവിത കാലത്തെന്ന പോലെ ജാതി-മത ഭേദമന്യെ അനേകായിരം തീർത്ഥാടകർ ഇവിടെ ഇപ്പോഴും എത്തിച്ചേരുന്നു.മമ്പുറം മഖാമിൽ നടക്കുന്ന പ്രധാന ചടങ്ങുകളിലൊന്നാണ് വ്യാഴാഴ്ച സ്വലാത്ത്.  മമ്പുറം തങ്ങളുടെ അമ്മാവനും ഭാര്യാപിതാവുമായ സയ്യിദ് ഹസൻ ബിൻ അലവി ജിഫ്‌രി തങ്ങളുടെ വിയോഗാനന്തരം മമ്പുറം തങ്ങൾ സ്ഥാപിച്ചതാണ് ഈ സ്വലാത്ത് മജ്ലിസ്.  
നേര്‍ച്ചകള്‍ക്കും സംഭാവനകള്‍ക്കും ബന്ധപ്പെടുക :
 91 9656310300 (Help Line) , 
+91 9996 313 786 , 
0494 2460 575, 
0494 2464 502 (Darul Huda).

Google Pay സൌകര്യം ലഭ്യമാണ്:
Number: +91 9996 313 786







Event Broadcasting: shahulbavu thurakkal

© Copyright : mampuram maqam

snippet.title: MIKA SINGH | Glassiyan | Aveera Singh | Bhavdeep Romana | Mista Baaz | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the latest Punjabi hit 'Glassiyan,' by Mika Singh featuring Aveera Singh.

Like || Share || Spread || Love

Make sure you subscribe and never miss a video: https://www.youtube.com/user/timesmusicindia?sub_confirmation=1

Audio Credits:
Singer: Mika Singh
Music: Mista Baaz
Lyrics: Deep Fateh
Producer: Raymant Marwah

Video Credits:
Featuring: Aveera Singh & Bhavdeep Romana
A Film by: Harry Singh | Preet Singh
D O P: Honey Cam
Edit / Grading: Gobindpuriya
Production Designer: Onkar Singh
Makeup / Hair: Guru Makeup & Team
Assistant Director: Inderjit Singh | Amrinder Singh
Choreographer: Shanty Kanwar
Assistant Choreographer: Aradhna Chand
Publicity Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Stills: Gws.studios
YouTube Promotions: Being Digital
Online Promotions: G K Digital

Download / Stream on:
Gaana - http://bit.ly/2ZIzr7E
iTunes - http://apple.co/2NQ2hAu
Apple Music - http://apple.co/2ZK8fFM
Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/CV1lVU59J
JioSaavn - http://bit.ly/3qSHKd2
Hungama - https://bit.ly/37Hi4Zg
Spotify - http://spoti.fi/2ZMf2yA
YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/3dFZftj
Resso Music - https://m.resso.app/ZSJdM4Nag/
Amazon Music - https://amzn.to/37HKLFy
BoomPlay - http://bit.ly/2OVJowr

Lyrics:
Chal Sheti nach gidhe vich sohniye, 
Tenu vekhne nu kale aa bade.
Tere naina cho shrab duldi,
Munde fad k galasiyan khare. 

Terea naina ch asi peg lona cohne aa.
Hor chardi na koi asi pani v na pohne aa.
Jo aakhan teriyan ch nasha kite hor nai,
Asi daru de mukate ghade.
Tere naina cho shrab duldi,
Munde fard k galasiyan khare. 

Bach k rahi tu koi hoje na khrabi.
Takni teri ne munde karte shrabi.
Jehra vekh lenda tenu oh ho janda tali.
Panj botlan jina tu nasha kardi a kali.
Nasha tereya naina ch behisab kudiye. 
Tere age fail aa shrab kudiye.
Husan tera tan jama kehar patlo.
Pishe lai firdiye Sara sehar patlo.
Mare dilan ute sat tu munde laye ne pat tu 
Aokha sada jina karta 

Sajri jawani teri nazran ton bach nee.
Gour nal vehnde munde patla jeya lak nee.
Tenu nachdi nu moda na koi marje,
Asi ese galo firde dare.
Tere naina cho shrab duldi,
Munde fard k galasiyan khare.

Tweet us your favourite videos on:  http://www.twitter.com/timesmusichub
Visit Our Website: http://www.timesmusic.com/

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj |  Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Thiruvannamalai Parai Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 23 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: Modi Rojgar Do | SSC Exam and Job Vacancies | Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
After the SSC CGL Exam results, lakhs of students have taken to social media to protest. But what exactly are they unhappy about? Why has Modi_Job_Do and Modi_Rojgar_Do being trending at no.1 on Twitter for many days? I explain the irregularities that are being faced by the students from the normalisation process to the delayed exam results to reducing vaccines and increasing unemployment. There has never been a more unified demand to grow the job market.

snippet.title: School Reopen Prachanaigal | School Life | Veyilon Entertainment
snippet.description:
Veyilon Entertainment presents “School Reopen” - a Tamil comedy on school life during the times of Corona. The teacher is worried because the class is empty, and there’s half attendance for online classes.

Are the students of class 12th commerce bunking the class? Did the teacher enter the right classroom? Why is the principal angry with the teacher?

Watch the 12th grader going back to school after the lockdown in this video.

If you like the video, subscribe to Veyilon Entertainment.

snippet.title: My First Car - Unveiling with family - Irfan's view
snippet.description:
#FirstCar #SuperCar #Irfansview

I am very much happy to announce you all that I bought my first car. This is the first car in my whole life and it gives me immense pleasure to show you all guys. We went to Route 66 where they sell a pre-owned luxury cars, and we saw many cars there. I decided to get a BMW M3 series as I was much impressed with the car.  I have come this far with all your supports and my hard work. I didn't even know that I will buy a normal car in my life, but the almighty showered his countless blessing on me. I would like to thank each one of you for supporting me. Keep supporting!!!

snippet.title: क्यों है Gada परिवार Tension में? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3110 -25th Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bapuji-finds-a-solution-1000109207?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3110: Jetha Reveals The Truth Of His Tension
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapu and Bapuji come into Jethalal's room to know why is he in tension. At first, Jethalal tries to hide the truth but as Bapu Ji insists, Jethalal tells them the truth of Bhogilal and the story of 50 lakh rupees. Bapu Ji gets annoyed at Bhogilal as well. Jethalal informs him about the reason why Ramson Company did give him the delivery. Catch the fun and watch the full episode now on SonyLIV.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Live Satsang with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar
snippet.description:
Maximize happiness, health & immunity. Cut down stress, anxiety, and depression! Learn the powerful breathing technique Sudarshan Kriya, along with Pranayama, Yoga, Meditation and Practical Tips for everyday living in the online Meditation and Breath workshop (The Art of Living Happiness Program).

 Register now 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

snippet.title: Kuruluş Osman 47. Bölüm
snippet.description:
47.Bölüm:
OSMAN BEY BÜYÜK SAVAŞA HAZIRLANIYOR
Çömlekçi İdris’in obadaki hainlerin ismini veremeden infaz edilmesinin ardından hainleri ortaya çıkarmak için harekete geçen Osman Bey, Nikola’nın Konstantinopolis’e çağırıldığı bilgisi alır. Nikola’yı ele geçirmek için bir baskın planlayan ve savaş hazırlıklarına başlayan Osman Bey, bu kez avını elinden kaçırmamaya kararlıdır. Papa’nın ajanları Melik ve Süleyman bu istihbaratın Osman Bey’e ulaştığının bilgisini verince, Nikola, Osman Bey’i ters köşeye yatırmak için plan kurar.  

MALHUN HATUN VE BALA HATUN ARASINDA SOĞUK RÜZGARLAR
Targun’un ölümünün ardından Kumanların lideri haline gelen Göktuğ, kutsal emanetleri Nikola’ya götürerek onun güvenini kazanmaya çalışır. Çömlekçi İdris’in ölümünün ardından güvende olduğunu düşünen Dündar Bey yeni bir ittifak arayışına girer. Alpleriyle birlikte uç bölgesine gelen ve obası için yeni bir yurt bulmak için çalışan Malhun Hatun’a Osman Bey’in ilgisi Bala Hatun’u rahatsız eder. Malhun Hatun’un bey kızı tavrı Bala Hatun’la arasında soğuk rüzgarlar esmesine neden olur. 

NİKOLA’NIN TAKTİĞİ İŞE YARAYACAK MI?
Osman Bey, Nikola’yı alt edebilmek için nasıl bir taktik kuracak? Nikola, Osman Bey’i tuzağa düşürebilecek mi? Bizans kuvvetleri ve Kayı alpleri arasındaki müthiş savaşın galibi kim olacak? Göktuğ, Nikola’nın güvenini kazanabilecek mi? Dündar Bey, yeni ittifakında aradığını bulabilecek mi? Malhun Hatun planlarını gerçekleştirebilecek mi? Malhun Hatun ve Bala Hatun arasında neler yaşanacak?
 
O, kömür karası gözleriyle, gaza ve hürriyet ateşini tutuşturacaktı. 

Adı, Ertuğrul Gazi oğlu Osman’dı… 

Karanlığın içinde ona yol gösteren “aşk” oldu…

Kan ve gözyaşıyla sulanan topraklarda, gök ekini gibi biçilen; yedi göğü, yedi yeri, dağları, denizleri aşacak bir milletin rüyasını “aşkla” gördü.

Gücünü kılıcından değil, “aşktan” aldı… Zorbalığa adaletle; köleliğe hürriyetle direnen, tarihin gördüğü en büyük imparatorluğa adını “aşkla” verdi.

72 milleti kıran bozuk düzene karşı başkaldırı, mazlumların sessiz çığlığına umut, Kuruluş’un adı oldu…

Kuruluş Osman… 400 çadırlık bir obadan, “ilahi aşkla” kurulan bir cihan imparatorluğuna yürüyüşün hikayesi.

Abone Olmak için ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

snippet.title: Bapuji Ne Diya Udhaar Chukane Ka Idea | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता - Ep 3110
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada

snippet.title: SELUNDUPKAN CAMILAN KE PESTA || Cara Keren MENYELUNDUPKAN MAKANAN ke Rumah Sakit dan Sekolah
snippet.description:
Cara menyelundupkan makanan dan camilan ke mana saja tanpa tertangkap

Kamu tahu rasanya - ketika kamu ingin ke bioskop atau tempat hiburan lainnya, dan kamu sadar ternyata tidak boleh membawa camilan dari luar. Rasanya pasti kesal, tapi kami tidak akan membiarkan kamu kelaparan. Video ini akan menunjukkan beberapa tips dan trik cerdas untuk membantumu menyelundupkan makanan ke mana saja tanpa ketahuan.
Ambil selimut, letakkan camilanmu di atasnya, tambahkan kepala boneka bayi, gulung selimutnya - jangan sampai kepala bonekanya tertutup dan voila. Kamu bisa berpura-pura bahwa camilan itu adalah bayimu.
Kamu juga bisa memasukkan camilan di dalam masker wajah. Tempelkan dengan gel gulali dan nikmati M&Mmu tanpa ada yang menyadarinya.
Kamu juga bisa menyembunyikan kue kecil di dalam pakaianmu. Kamu hanya butuh karet gelang untuk menahannya. Tonton video ini untuk melihat cara melakukannya.

Urutan Waktu:
1:11 - Cara menyembunyikan makanan di kelas
2:13 - Menyembunyikan camilan di sisirmu
3:55 - Cara menyembunyikan skittles di masker tidurmu
6:19 - Cara menyelundupkan makanan ke kelas
7:21 - Sembunyikan permenmu di dalam pulpen

Video ini dibuat untuk tujuan hiburan. Kami tidak membuat jaminan mengenai kelengkapan, keamanan, dan keandalan. Setiap tindakan yang Anda ambil berdasarkan informasi pada video ini sepenuhnya menjadi risiko Anda sendiri, dan kami tidak akan bertanggung jawab atas kerusakan atau kerugian apa pun. Menjadi tanggung jawab penonton agar bertindak penuh pertimbangan, kewaspadaan, dan kehati-hatian apabila Anda berencana meniru.

Video berikut ini mungkin menampilkan kegiatan yang dilakukan oleh aktor kami dalam lingkungan yang terkendali – harap bertindak penuh pertimbangan, kewaspadaan, dan kehati-hatian apabila Anda hendak meniru.

Semua produk dan nama perusahaan yang ditampilkan di video ini adalah merek dagang™ atau merek dagang terdaftar® dari masing-masing pemilik. Penggunaan produk tidak menyiratkan afiliasi atau dukungan apa pun dari yang bersangkutan.

snippet.title: Disney and Pixar's Luca | Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Disney and Pixar invite you to experience a summer like never before. Luca arrives June 2021.

Set in a beautiful seaside town on the Italian Riviera, Disney and Pixar’s original feature film “Luca” is a coming-of-age story about one young boy experiencing an unforgettable summer filled with gelato, pasta and endless scooter rides. Luca shares these adventures with his newfound best friend, but all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface. Directed by Academy Award® nominee Enrico Casarosa (“La Luna”) and produced by Andrea Warren (“Lava,” “Cars 3”), “Luca” releases Summer 2021.

http://instagram.com/pixarluca/
https://twitter.com/pixarluca
http://facebook.com/pixarluca
Hashtag: #PixarLuca

snippet.title: Boss | बॉस | Scene 7 | Brothers Meet Again | Akshay Kumar | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: Chennai 600028  New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021 | Jai | Venkat Prabhu | Yuvan Shankar Raja
snippet.description:
Presenting South Indian New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie " Chennai 600028 “Starring Jai, Shiva, Vaibhav, Premji, Aravind Akash, Nithin Sathya, Vijay Vasanth, Ajay Raj, Mahat Raghavendra
#Chennai600028, #venkatprabhu, #Adityamovies, #jai

Produced by: Aditya Music (India) Pvt. Ltd
Starring: Jai, Shiva, Vaibhav, Premji, Aravind Akash, Nithin Sathya, Vijay Vasanth, Ajay Raj, Mahat Raghavendra
Music by: Yuvan Shankar Raja

movie synopsis :
This is the story of friendship, love, and rivalry between two street cricket league teams. The film's name is the pin code for Mandaveli, a suburb of Chennai. If you want to feel the vibe, energy, exuberance of our streets then this is a must-watch film for you. It starts when Raghu moves to Visalakshi Thaottam, along with his parents. He is not excited about shifting to the location as his enemies live in the same area. He is very loyal to his team but his team replaces him with a new guy. Raghu is upset about this and distances himself from cricket. Slowly things turn around to make Raghu help his friend in his love relationship. Raghu starts playing for the Sharks team against the Rockers team, Unfortunately, things do not go as planned by Raghu. His friend loses his life. To know how the team under tight pressure in a nail-biting finish how the team stands up against all the odds to stand high to keep up the game.

snippet.title: கேம் ஆப் த்ரோன் S08 E05-06 ருத்ர தாண்டவம் ஆடும் டிராகன் குயின்! கடைசியில், அரியணை ஏறியது யார்?
snippet.description:
ஸ்பார்ட்டகஸ், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cms3J7yd-PZw6i8yvxvRVsL0 

கேம் ஆப் த்ரோன் எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvQJVpgEhGHzhWYkIwv-K79 

மணி ஹெய்ஸ்ட், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvIDmOkZOfaASz7isTkqQC0 

சூப்பர் நேச்சுரல், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmuUrBMYJqojFflA4u3ccegx

உலக சினிமா உள்ளூர் மொழியில். There are 80 million people who speaks Tamil language. But only half population knows English. How they will taste the world of Hollywood TV Series? as not all foreign language TV series are being dubbed in Tamil. So, We are just reviewing TV series in Tamil language for those Tamil people who don't know English.

In this Mr Tamilan SERIES channel, we will cover the following genre TV Series

Fantasy TV Series
Horror TV Series
Action TV Series
Adventure TV Series

Historic TV Series
Comedy TV Series

snippet.description:
বন্ধুরা আজকের ভিডিওটি তে আমরা আপনাদের বিয়ের মরসুমের জন্য ৫ টি নতুন এমন অসাধারণ Wedding Hacks দেখাবো যা প্রত্যেকটি মেয়ে ও টিনএজার দের জীবন বদলে দিতে পারে।  যে কোন বিয়ে বাড়ি যাওয়ার আগে এগুলি অবশ্যই দেখুন।  
In this video we will share with you World's Best Life Saving Wedding Hacks that will make your life easy and will prepare you for wedding or occasion.
